questionHtml:
Thurston believes that artists with a higher number of social media followers sell more albums in the first week. He carries out a hypothesis test using a 10 % significance level with the following null hypothesis:

H0: In the population, there is no monotonic relationship between the number of social media followers and the number of albums sold in the first week.

Calculate the value of rs, Spearman’s rank correlation coefficient.

meta.title: Calculate the value of rs, Spearman’s rank correlation coefficient.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.11—Expected, observed, hypotheses, chi squared, gof, t-test
